title: EKS Document Base Schema - Definitions
description: Document metadata, structural element definitions, shared enums for document type, file type, element type codes, and lifecycle stages per T1.35. v1.8.0: T1.99.157–158 (I193) — added x_export boolean flag to every property in document_metadata_def and project_metadata_def; added export_artifact_def enumerating 3 export artifacts (discovery_inventory, extraction_results, review_flags) with schema-driven column subsets. v1.7.0: T1.99.150 (I186) — doc_id_format changed from '{doc_number}-{revision}' pattern to UUID v4 pattern; id is now system-generated, not business-key-derived. v1.6.0: added lifecycle_stage_code enum + 15 new optional columns in document_metadata_def for document metadata completeness (T1.99.141–T1.99.146): supersedes, superseded_by, document_title, lifecycle_stage, revision_date, revision_description, embedded_revision_number, references_documents, project_phase, contract_package, issued_date, responsible_engineer, total_sheets, language, vendor_name. v1.5.0 was bypassed (combined into v1.6.0). v1.4.0: added file_property_source_def, file_property_pattern_def, file_property_os_def + 13 new optional columns in document_metadata_def for Appendix J FilePropertyExtractor (T1.99.128). v1.3.0: added filename_pattern_def, filename_segment_def, filename_output_def, filename_error_subcodes_def for Appendix I FilenameParser (T1.99.111).

doc_id_format.description: Document identifier format: UUID v4 (system-generated). T1.99.150 (I186) changed from '{doc_number}-{revision}' business key to pure UUID.

document_type_code.description: Document type codes aligned with ontology document_type_mapping (Appendix C) and TWRP assets.

file_type_code.description: Source file format codes aligned with TWRP parsers and pipeline parsers config.

element_type_code.description: Structural element types per Appendix D D7.10.

revision_id.description: Document revision identifier. Validation patterns defined in doc config (revision_validation).

lifecycle_stage_code.description: Document lifecycle stage codes per engineering document control workflow. T1.99.143.

file_path.description: Relative path to source file on disk

file_type.description: Source file format for parser routing

file_size.description: OS-level file size in bytes (from Path.stat().st_size)

file_created_at.description: OS-level file creation timestamp (from st_ctime, UTC ISO 8601)

file_modified_at.description: OS-level file last-modified timestamp (from st_mtime, UTC ISO 8601)

file_hash.description: Content hash (MD5 or SHA256) for integrity verification

embedded_title.description: Embedded document title from parser metadata

embedded_subject.description: Embedded document subject from parser metadata

embedded_created_date.description: Embedded creation date from parser metadata

embedded_modified_date.description: Embedded modification date from parser metadata

embedded_creator_app.description: Application that created the file (e.g. AutoCAD 2024)

embedded_producer.description: Library/producer that generated the file (e.g. pdfplot15.hdi)

embedded_last_modified_by.description: Last user who modified the file (from DOCX/XLSX core properties)

embedded_sheet_count.description: Number of sheets in XLSX workbook

supersedes.description: FK to documents.id — the previous revision this document supersedes. T1.99.141.

superseded_by.description: FK to documents.id — the next revision that supersedes this document. T1.99.141.

revision_date.description: Date of this revision (ISO 8601 string). T1.99.143.

revision_description.description: Description of changes in this revision. T1.99.143.

embedded_revision_number.description: Revision number from embedded DOCX/XLSX core properties. T1.99.144.

references_documents.description: Array of doc_id strings this document references. T1.99.145.

project_phase.description: Project lifecycle phase (e.g. tender, construction, as_built). T1.99.146.

issued_date.description: Formal issue/submission date to client (ISO 8601 string). T1.99.146.

responsible_engineer.description: Engineer accountable for the document. T1.99.146.

total_sheets.description: Total sheets in multi-sheet drawing set. T1.99.146.

language.description: ISO 639-1 language code of document content. T1.99.146.

vendor_name.description: Equipment vendor name for vendor-supplied documents. T1.99.146.

document_element_def.description: Structural element extracted from a document (cover page, section, table, image, etc.) per Appendix D D7.10.

title.description: Heading, field name, or section title

content.description: Raw text or JSON for complex structures

filename_segment_def.description: Single positional segment definition within a filename pattern (Appendix I §I4.4).

filename_output_def.description: Output control configuration for filename parsing (Appendix I §I4.5).

filename_error_subcodes_def.description: Maps error conditions to P5-F-* error codes (Appendix I §I4.2).

filename_pattern_def.description: Single filename pattern entry (Appendix I §I4.2). Keyed by project_code or '*' for default.

file_property_source_def.description: Single source-key-to-registry-column mapping for parser-embedded metadata (Appendix J §J2.1).

source_key.description: Key name in parser extract_metadata() return dict

required.description: Whether this property is required for health scoring

enabled.description: Master switch for OS-level property extraction

hash_algorithm.description: Hashing algorithm for file integrity check

enabled.description: Whether property extraction is enabled for this file type

extraction_method.description: parser_metadata = read embedded metadata from parser output; os_only = only Path.stat()

property_mapping.description: Mapping from parser extract_metadata() keys to registry columns

export_artifact_def.description: Defines the column subset for each export artifact (CSV/XLSX). Pipeline reads this at runtime instead of hardcoded column lists. T1.99.158 (I193).

discovery_inventory.description: Columns for Phase A discovery inventory. All x_export fields except extraction-specific ones (page_count, extract_status, extraction_confidence, extraction_notes).

extraction_results.description: Columns for Phase B extraction results. All x_export fields including extraction metadata.

review_flags.description: Columns for Phase C review flags. Focused subset for extraction-quality triage + computed flag_reason.
